title: saxifraga mutata subsp. demissa
intro: Saxifraga mutata subsp. demissa, also known as the modified saxifrage, is a plant species in the Saxifragaceae family. It is characterized by its unique, pale yellow flowers with five petals and a rounded leaf shape. Traditionally, Saxifraga mutata subsp. demissa has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and is said to have potential in treating various health issues such as wounds, fever, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and decoctions, have been used to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
